mapper.select: SELECT id, account, company_name, region, audit_status, status FROM merchant WHERE id = #{merchantId} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.cover_url, s.score, s.price_per_capita, s.address, a.name AS area_name, c.name AS city_name, cat.name AS category_name, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.tags FROM shop s LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = s.category_id
ORDER BY s.score DESC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY s.has_deal DESC, s.score DESC, s.id DESC
ORDER BY a.sort_no ASC, s.id ASC
ORDER BY s.has_deal DESC, s.score DESC, s.id DESC
LIMIT #{query.pageSize} OFFSET #{query.offset}
